title: Rate Limiting Explained: Token Bucket vs Leaky Bucket
description: A hands-on walkthrough of building an API rate limiter, comparing the token-bucket and leaky-bucket algorithms with real code.
focus: A hands-on engineering post about implementing API rate limiting — token-bucket and leaky-bucket algorithms, per-key limits, and absorbing bursts. The ideal post author is a backend engineer building or debugging a rate limiter in their own service.
notSubject: generic 'scale your startup' or API-product marketing
network or ISP rate limiting at the router/QoS layer
complaints about a third-party SaaS API's limits with no implementation angle
crypto or trading talk that happens to use the words 'rate' or 'token'
